meta.title: Sitemaker.UA — Websites that sell | Web development in Ukraine
meta.description: Sitemaker.UA web studio. We build business cards, landing pages, corporate sites and online stores. Fast, responsive, SEO-ready. Ukraine and Europe. From 5000 UAH.
meta.ogDescription: Modern turnkey websites. Design, code, SEO, hosting. Working across Ukraine and Europe.

hero.subtitle: Modern, fast and responsive sites — from idea to launch, all under one roof. Ukraine and Europe.

services.title: Services & pricing
services.subtitle: Pick a format — we'll discuss the details and tailor the solution to your budget and goals.

card.name: Business card site
card.description: A concise page with information about you, services and contacts. Ideal for professionals and small businesses.

landing.name: Landing page
landing.description: A single-page site focused on conversion. Sells a product, service or campaign.

corporate.name: Corporate website
corporate.description: Multi-page company site: services, portfolio, blog, team, contacts.

shop.name: Online store
shop.description: Full e-commerce: catalog, cart, payment, delivery, customer accounts.

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: The site loads in under 2 seconds. Google rewards fast sites — you get more customers from search.

seo.title: SEO out of the box
seo.description: Semantic markup, meta tags, Open Graph, sitemap, robots.txt. Ready to be indexed from day one.

responsive.title: Responsive
responsive.description: Mobile-first approach. Looks perfect on iPhone, Android, tablets and wide monitors.

support.title: Support
support.description: We don't disappear after launch. We fix bugs, add features and answer your questions.

brief.title: Brief
brief.description: We discuss your goals, audience and competitors. We draft the spec and lock in deadlines.

design.title: Design
design.description: We design the layout in Figma. We iterate until it fully matches your vision.

development.title: Development
development.description: We code on a modern Next.js stack. We hook up analytics, forms and integrations.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: We deploy to hosting, configure your domain, run final tests and hand over the keys.

q1.question: How much does a website cost?
q1.answer: It depends on type and features. Business card — from 5,000 UAH; landing — from 8,000 UAH; corporate — from 15,000 UAH; online store — from 25,000 UAH. We'll quote precisely after the brief.

q2.question: How long does it take?
q2.answer: Business card — 5 days. Landing — 7-10 days. Corporate — 2-3 weeks. Online store — from 4 weeks. Timing depends on scope and feedback speed.

q3.question: Do I need a domain and hosting?
q3.answer: Yes. We'll help pick a domain (~10 USD/year) and connect free Vercel hosting. Domain is not included in the price, but setup is on us.

q4.question: Can I request changes after launch?
q4.answer: Yes. The first month of fixes is free. After that — hourly rate or a monthly support plan.

q5.question: How does payment work?
q5.answer: 50% upfront, 50% on launch. We can invoice through a private entrepreneur (FOP) or accept a card transfer.

q6.question: Do you work with clients in Europe?
q6.answer: Yes. We work remotely across Europe. Communication in Ukrainian, Russian or English.

contact.title: Ready to discuss your project?
contact.subtitle: Send a request — we'll reply within an hour during work hours.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Thanks! We'll be in touch shortly.
form.errorShort: Please describe the project in more detail

footer.tagline: Building websites that work for your business.
